title: Sweden API Normalizer
description: Reads raw SourceRecord data from stdin (piped from se-source-fetcher) and normalizes each record into a canonical ApiRecord conforming to api_record.schema.json.

source_file.description: Path to JSONL file of raw source records (alternative to stdin)

strict.description: Fail on missing required fields instead of flagging

output_schema.description: Emits data events with ApiRecord payloads, one per normalized record
